title: forceable signal can not be forced when --coverage-toggle option is activated
body:
Hello,

in our project, we use Verilator v4.219. We do not plan to move to v5 for the moment.
Internaly, we use a COCOTB-like stimuli language that got translated into C++.
We do have a"signal_force" keyword that uses Verilator's forceable feature.
We have noticed that when the --coverage-toggle option is activated, the signal does not get forced anymore.
That seems quite logical that these two features generate a conflict.
For the moment, we plan to manually exclude the forceable signal from the coverage.
It might be useful to take into account this corner case inside Verilator and to generate a warning.

Frédéric Requin
